attributes.description: Alerts when `vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization > 80%`. Datastore full halts VMs using it.
attributes.name: [vSphere OTel] Datastore utilization high

investigation_guide.blob:
## vSphere datastore utilization high

### What fired
Datastore utilisation exceeded 80% during the window.

### Why it matters
Full datastores prevent VM snapshots, migrations, and thin-disk growth. Critical to address before hitting 100%.

### Triage
1. Identify large VMs / snapshots on the datastore.

### Remediation
- Storage vMotion VMs to a less utilised datastore.
- Grow the datastore.

### Tuning
- 80% threshold; tighten for small datastores.

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-vcenterreceiver.otel-*
// Datastore disk utilization (%): healthy <80%; critical >90% approaching full
// Adjust threshold (e.g. 80 or 90) based on provisioning lead time
| WHERE vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization IS NOT NULL AND vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization > 80
| STATS utilization_pct = MAX(vcenter.datastore.disk.utilization) BY vcenter.datacenter.name, vcenter.datastore.name
| SORT utilization_pct DESC
| LIMIT 20
